\tzpentry{ID3578}{Rhot Action Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3578 introduces Rhot Action Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal S[\rho;t] \;=\; -\mathrm{Tr}[\rho\log\rho] \;+\; \frac{1}{T_{\rm env}}\!\int \delta Q_{\rm irr} \;+\; k_B\log\Omega + S_{\rm info}[\mathrm{Wigner}(\psi)], \]
